---
name: 🚀 Suggest an Enhancement
about: Suggest a new feature, idea, or minor improvement for dicom_to_ros
title: '[ENHANCEMENT] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem or limitation is (e.g., "The node currently doesn't map DICOM tag X to ROS 2 message Y...").

## Describe the Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen and how you envision the feature working within the `dicom_to_ros` pipeline.

## Describe Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered that didn't work for you.

## Why is this useful to the majority of users?
Explain why this enhancement fits the scope of the project and benefits most users rather than a small subset. 

## Additional Context
Add any other context, code examples, or design ideas here. If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to demonstrate the workflow.
